name: 少女的求生之路：研究所
slug: 少女的求生之路研究所
short_description: 2D pixels+beautiful girl+high-definition CG+super rich plot+numerous endings! Put aside the boring and peaceful daily routine, and enjoy the life of sticking with beautiful girls to the fullest in a different world~
detailed_description:
The Girl's Path to Survival: Research Institute

2D pixels+transforming into a beautiful girl+high-definition CG+super rich plot+numerous endings!

{Gameplay Introduction}

1. Day night system: The time in the game will naturally flow, and the map will also have changes during the day, dusk, and night.

2. Date system: Players will spend seven days in the research institute, during which they can move freely without constraints.

3. Life system: The protagonist has fatigue level, satiety level, thirst level, and needs to eat, drink, and sleep to maintain physical health. If not taken seriously, the game will end.

4. Plot Branches (Key Points): As a role-playing game, there are many plot branches in the game.

You will encounter a lot of choices in the game, and each choice will trigger different events, even involving the actions of the relevant characters the next day.

It is not an exaggeration to say that your choice is related to the fate of the entire world.

5. Multiple endings: Rich endings, each carefully crafted OWO

{Here is the content introduction}

Shocked! A man who left home in the middle of the night was transported by a truck to a different world and turned into a fantastic pink haired beauty?!

~The peaceful daily life is over. What rushed to the battlefield immediately was the wonderful life of the super cute anime in the different world~

Happy and lively cat lady roommates, mysterious and dangerous twin ponytail girls, silent white haired little girls wandering around, and even distinguished ladies coming to inspect?!

But you understand that even the most beautiful life has an end, so you must find a way to {go home} within seven days.

This is a heartwarming and slightly mysterious story.
